summary: Implemented checksum-based ingestion service and RAG worker with deterministic rule persistence, embeddings, provenance, and job status transitions.

assertions_verified.evidence: Service persists ExtractedRule and RuleProvenance records; no runtime LLM dependency introduced in ingestion flow.

commands: .venv312/bin/pytest tests/test_task_api_003.py tests/test_task_api_004.py tests/test_task_api_005.py tests/test_task_api_006.py tests/test_task_api_007.py tests/test_task_fsm_001.py tests/test_task_obs_001.py tests/test_task_rag_001.py -q
notes: Broader suite required installing reportlab in the local verification venv because export tests import it at module load time.
